items.title: Former top officials say Putin being misled about progress of war as Russian advances in Ukraine slow
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kenya minister halts construction of US-backed Ebola quarantine centre
items.dek: Aden Duale defied a High Court order to stop building work on a controversial US-funded facility.
items.body: Aden Duale defied a High Court order to stop building work on a controversial US-funded facility.

items.title: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
items.dek: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".
items.body: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".
